zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford於大約1020年出生在法國諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓時，他的父親Osbern the Steward de Crépon32歲，母親Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux30歲。他於大約1051年與Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford在法國諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1071年2月20日在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德卡塞享年52歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾可麥利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford于大约1020年出生在法国諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓时，他的父亲Osbern the Steward de Crépon32岁，母亲Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux30岁。他于大约1051年与Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford在法国諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1071年2月20日在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德卡塞享年52岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾可麥利斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wiilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford was born about 1020, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, was 32 and his mother, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, was 30. He married Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford about 1051, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 February 1071, in Cassel, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Cormeilles, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford est né environ 1020, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford environ 1051, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1071, à Cassel, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford um 1020 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbern the Steward de Crépon 32 und seine Mutter Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux 30. Er hat um 1051 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1071 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Cassel, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford è nato il circa 1020 nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford circa 1051, nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Herefordが約1020年にフランスノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンで生まれた時，父Osbern the Steward de Créponは32歳，母Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeuxは30歳であった。約1051年にフランスノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンでAdelise de Tosny Countess of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1071年2月20日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードカセルで52歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアコルメイレスにて埋葬された。

ko.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 리e
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbern the Steward de Crépon(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1051년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1071년 2월 20일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 캐셀에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콜이레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford aproximadamente 1051, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1071, em Cassel, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: лирe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford родился около 1020 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Osbern the Steward de Crépon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford около 1051 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 февраля 1071 г. в местности кассел, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности кормиллесь, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.Hastings, East Sussex, England: Hastings, East Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford nació aproximadamente 1020, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford aproximadamente 1051, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1071, en Cassel, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
